violations.text: Food contact surfaces of a salad spinner was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025
Walk-in door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris: - prep units, - freezer, - refrigerators, - bar coolers, - walk-in fans (beverage and food walk-ins), - cold hold drawers, - chips drawers, - shelves, - slicer base. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

The floors, floor drains, and walls throughout the facility including walk-in coolers have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety licensed with RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Inspector provided applications during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2024

The sink and surface concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink at the bar was below the recommended concentration. Bar ware to be brought to dish machine to be sanitized until 3-bay dispenser is serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024
Food observed stored under dripping condensate un the walk-in cooler. PIC moved foods during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
Hotel pans to hold utensils in the prep unit were observed in direct contact with sauces. PIC removed during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the storage and service areas. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024
The non-food contact surfaces under the grill and flat top have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

Multiple floor drains in the kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
